case_title: THE CITY TOW VS CRESCI, STEVEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRESCI, STEVEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-26-2001, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT CRESCI, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-08-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-08-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 3/8/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRESCI, STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-08-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-31-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRESCI, STEVEN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
